name: The Pocket Tin
description: Our signature selection — four hand-tied, fish-tested patterns in a slim pocket tin. Each tin includes two Zebra Midges, a Foam Beetle, and a Blue Collared Bugger, plus a fifth 'Guide's Choice' fly selected randomly — because you should always have an ace up your sleeve.
details: Each Pocket Tin ships with 5 total flies (4 core patterns + 1 random). The tin itself is a rugged, slim-profile aluminum case that fits anywhere. Built for everything from your backyard creek to high-alpine lakes.

name: Arrowhead Sticker
description: Premium die-cut vinyl sticker. Waterproof, UV-resistant, and built to last on your truck, cooler, fly box, or water bottle. 2" x 2".
details: High-quality, outdoor-grade vinyl with a matte laminate finish. Designed to handle rain, sun, and years on the water.
